pages.text: 博物馆好大呀！咘咘紧紧牵着爸爸的手，有点害怕。
pages.text_en: The museum was so big! Bubu held Daddy's hand tight, feeling a little scared.

pages.text: "不怕不怕，爸爸妈妈在呢！" NOMI 也拉着咘咘的手。
pages.text_en: "Don't be scared, Daddy and Mommy are here!" NOMI held Bubu's hand too.

pages.text: 哇！好大的古建筑模型！咘咘看到了中国古代的宫殿。
pages.text_en: Wow! A huge model of an ancient building! Bubu saw a Chinese palace from long ago.

pages.text: 这幅画好漂亮！咘咘指着墙上的画，眼睛亮亮的。
pages.text_en: What a pretty painting! Bubu pointed at the wall, her eyes sparkling.

pages.text: 这是什么呀？咘咘好奇地看着一件件古老的宝贝。
pages.text_en: What's this? Bubu looked curiously at the ancient treasures, one by one.

pages.text: 妈妈给咘咘讲故事："这是很久很久以前的房子哦！"
pages.text_en: Mommy told Bubu a story. "This is a house from a very, very long time ago!"

pages.text: 走累了，坐下来吃点东西吧！
pages.text_en: After lots of walking, time to sit down and have a snack!

pages.text: 吃饱了，咘咘又有力气啦！"我还要看！"
pages.text_en: All fueled up, Bubu had energy again! "I want to see more!"

pages.text: 咘咘发现了一个大大的地球仪，转啊转啊转！
pages.text_en: Bubu found a great big globe and spun it round and round!

pages.text: 从害怕到喜欢，咘咘的世界变大了！
pages.text_en: From scared to amazed — Bubu's world just got bigger!

pages.text: 今天咘咘学到了好多好多！下次还要来博物馆！
pages.text_en: Bubu learned so much today! She wants to come to the museum again!
